steps.action: Open / in desktop viewport and clear error log
steps.expected: Leads view renders with default filters
steps.observed: Leads view loaded at / with default controls visible

steps.action: Set search input to 'garcia' and status filter to 'Contacted'
steps.expected: URL query params update to reflect filter state
Query string contains the selected filters

assertions.title: URL params pre-apply filters on load

steps.expected: Status control preselects New from URL params
steps.observed: Status dropdown value was 'New' on initial load

steps.action: Inspect search/status controls and table rows
steps.expected: Controls and results reflect URL params
steps.observed: Search input was empty, status='New', rowCount=25, uniqueStatuses=['New']

steps.action: Verify filtered data is shown immediately after load
steps.observed: Rows were pre-filtered to New status on arrival

steps.expected: Stacked cards are shown, desktop table hidden

steps.observed: Storm Watch route loaded on mobile viewport

steps.expected: Stacked cards shown, desktop table hidden

assertions.title: Sidebar collapses to hamburger on mobile

steps.observed: Mobile viewport active with leads content rendered

steps.action: Inspect navigation chrome before opening menu
steps.expected: Hamburger visible and sidebar hidden off-canvas
steps.observed: hamburgerVisible=true; sidebar transform translated to x=-212 (off-screen)

assertions.title: Sidebar opens as overlay on hamburger tap

steps.action: On mobile (375x812), open / and tap hamburger
steps.expected: Sidebar overlay opens with nav items
steps.observed: Sidebar transform moved to 0; backdropPresent=true; navButtons include Leads, Storm Watch, Cases, Analytics

steps.action: Tap 'Storm Watch' nav item from opened overlay
steps.expected: App navigates to /storm-watch and overlay closes
steps.observed: URL changed to /storm-watch; sidebar translated back off-canvas; backdrop removed

evidence.network: Route navigation between / and /storm-watch; storm_candidates.json fetch observed

assertions.title: Browser back/forward restores URL filter state and defaults

steps.observed: URL became / with search='' and status='All'

steps.expected: Prior filtered URL state is restored from history
steps.observed: URL restored to /?search=garcia&status=Contacted with search='garcia' and status='Contacted'
URL returned to / with search='' and status='All'

frictions.description: Chaining heredoc eval with additional agent-browser commands intermittently produced 'SyntaxError: Unexpected identifier session'.
frictions.resolution: Ran eval checks as separate commands after screenshot/navigation steps.

frictions.description: Selector-based click on mobile overlay nav (`aside nav button:nth-of-type(2)`) timed out while menu was open.
frictions.resolution: Used interactive snapshot refs and clicked the explicit Storm Watch nav ref; navigation and overlay-close behavior validated.

summary: Tested 7 infra browser assertions (VAL-INFRA-011..017): 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. URL sync, URL-driven pre-application, mobile card layouts, mobile sidebar overlay behavior, and back/forward URL-state restoration including empty-query defaults all validated with screenshots and DOM checks.
